nodes.title: Control Flow: Conditional Statements
nodes.subject: python
nodes.description: Introduce `if`, `elif`, and `else` statements. Explain indentation and block structure.

nodes.title: Control Flow: Loops
nodes.subject: python
nodes.description: Cover `for` loops (with `range` and iterables) and `while` loops. Introduce `break` and `continue` statements.

nodes.title: Data Structures: Dictionaries and Sets
nodes.subject: python
nodes.description: Introduce dictionaries (key-value pairs, unordered) and sets (unique elements, unordered). Cover common operations.

nodes.title: Data Structures: Lists and Tuples
nodes.subject: python
nodes.description: Explain lists (mutable, ordered) and tuples (immutable, ordered). Cover common operations like indexing, slicing, adding/removing elements (for lists).

nodes.title: Error Handling with Exceptions
nodes.subject: python
nodes.description: Explain different types of errors (syntax, runtime). Introduce `try`, `except`, `else`, and `finally` blocks for handling exceptions.

nodes.title: File Input/Output
nodes.subject: python
nodes.description: Cover reading from and writing to text files. Introduce `open()`, `read()`, `write()`, `close()`, and the `with` statement.

nodes.title: Functions
nodes.subject: python
nodes.description: Explain how to define and call functions. Cover parameters, arguments, return values, scope (local/global), and default arguments.

nodes.title: Introduction to Python
nodes.subject: python
nodes.description: Cover what Python is, its history, common uses, and how to set up a basic development environment (interpreter, IDE/editor).

nodes.title: Modules and Packages
nodes.subject: python
nodes.description: Explain how to organize code into modules and packages. Cover `import` statements and the Python Standard Library.

nodes.title: Object-Oriented Programming Basics
nodes.subject: python
nodes.description: Introduce core OOP concepts: classes, objects, attributes, methods, `self`, constructors (`__init__`).

nodes.title: Operators and Expressions
nodes.subject: python
nodes.description: Cover arithmetic, comparison, logical, and assignment operators. Explain how expressions are evaluated.

nodes.title: Variables and Basic Data Types
nodes.subject: python
nodes.description: Explain variables, naming conventions, and fundamental data types like integers, floats, strings, and booleans. Introduce basic operations.
